column3: The 1906R, like its cousins the 2002R and the 860v2, is led by a sole unit featuring a combination of flexible ACTEVA LITE cushioning, shock absorbing N-ergy, and segmented ABZORB SBS pods at the heel. This hi-tech approach is also reflected in the 1906R’s upper design, which features open-holed mesh and a series of curvilinear synthetic overlays. This distinctive take on the era’s design conventions offers a refined execution of high-performance heritage.

The original 740 was the kind of daily runner that would be worn into the ground with heavy miles and bought all over again. This longtime fan favorite returns from the archives, poised to inspire a whole new generation of devotees. The 740 combines familiar elements of 2000s running-inspiration – an open knit mesh upper, segmented midsole, and a streamlined silhouette – with flourishes like two-tone color mesh and angular overlays, that give the 740 a unique visual identity. Whether you’re discovering, or rediscovering, the 740 is ready to become your next favorite shoe.

These adidas Sambae shoes breathe new life into a classic. Long gone are the days of the Samba as just an indoor training shoe — this fresh take on a timeless silhouette ushers in a new era of effortless versatility. A slightly more elevated gum rubber outsole and reworked upper add a modernized perspective that pairs perfectly with both casual and dressed-up looks.

column3:
New Balance WRPD Runner

The WRPD Runner's unique design concept is brought to life with a combination of exaggerated proportions and minimalist restraint. The new model suggests fluid movement with the curved contours of the full-length FuelCell midsole and the many undulating accents that surround the sleek knit upper. Individual elements from classic models have been alienated beyond recognition and integrated naturally into the new design. The WRPD Runner is designed to feel familiar while also pushing the boundaries of classic running culture.

column3:
Nike Air Jordan 4 Retro SE Craft *GS*

The next release of the Nike Air Jordan 4 is nicknamed the *Craft*. This release of the classic designed by Tinker Hatfield uses a dark green leather upper. A special highlight are the typical lattice inserts of the Air Jordan 4, which have been replaced by die-cut panels. Black details like the lacestays and the Jumpman on the heel round off the design.

LEGENDARY STYLE REFINED.

The radiance lives on in the Nike Air Force 1 ’07, the b-ball OG that puts a fresh spin on what you know best: durably stitched overlays, clean finishes and the perfect amount of flash to make you shine.


Benefits

  • The stitched overlays on the upper add heritage style, durability and support.
  • Originally designed for performance hoops, the Nike Air cushioning adds lightweight, all-day comfort.
  • The low-cut silhouette adds a clean, streamlined look.
  • The padded collar feels soft and comfortable.

Air Force 1 Origins

Debuting in 1982, the AF1 was the first basketball shoe to house Nike Air, revolutionizing the game while rapidly gaining traction around the world. Today, the Air Force 1 stays true to its roots with the same soft and springy cushioning that changed sneaker history.

column3:
Bright colors and big energy come together in the Tatum 2 "Vortex." The lightweight, flexible design was created with energy return in mind, and this colorway is all about how Jayson helps energize his team. When you're wearing them on the court, your opponents won't be able to ignore all the moves you make—but that doesn't mean they can stop you from scoring.

Conforming Fit

The frame wraps underneath the sole and onto the upper, helping support your low-to-the-ground gameplay.

Get Grippy

You're always moving on the court. That's where the rubber outsole and ground-contact foam come in—adding responsiveness and traction for your offense and defense.

Lightweight Build

Every time you go up with a light shoe, you're saving energy. We used rubber on the outsole (where you need it most) but foam with ample traction does the heavy lifting.



Product Details

  • Shown: Mint Foam/Black/Hyper Jade/Lava Glow
  • Style: FJ6457-300

column2: Adidas AE 1J With Love Mid GS
column3:
The adidas Anthony Edwards 1—Lace up in the style of one of the game's emerging superstars. These juniors' signature sneakers from adidas Basketball and Anthony Edwards are built for certified bucket getters. The combined BOOST and Lightstrike midsole is ultra-lightweight and adds outstanding energy return to your most explosive moves. A rubber outsole provides all the support you need to attack the hoop, while signature Anthony Edwards branding completes the look.

  • Lightweight midsole brings excellent energy return.
  • Rubber outsole delivers traction.

Watch your boys move with power and make it rain on the court with the PUMA MB.03. Part of LaFrance, LaMelo Ball's official lifestyle fashion brand, these shoes celebrate Melo's electrifying game and bold style while taking your champions' performances to the next level. The disruptive design is packaged with a premium engineered woven mesh upper material and provides lightweight support to your kids.

The seamless construction with multi-zoned materials adds breathability and comfort. Flaunting vibrant patterns, these LaMelo-inspired sneakers fuse elements of slime and claw marks to celebrate explosive players, who truly define the ever-so-popular term "other-worldly." Lightweight, sleek, and performance-driven, the PUMA MB.03 helps your boys stack threes like legends.

PUMA MB.03 features:

  • Engineered woven mesh upper offers breathability.
  • Nitro Infused Foam in the midsole provides superior responsiveness and lightweight cushioning.
  • TPU heel counter brings added lateral stability.
  • Full-coverage high-abrasion tread pattern on the outsole with non-slip rubber compounds adds reliable traction.

Drop a dime, cut the net, and show your game like a true champion with the Nike Lebron XXI. Loaded with Air Zoom units, these LeBron-inspired shoes discard the excess weight and are curved to bend in all directions, offering you perfect fluidity and explosiveness. Keeping you low to the ground, these hardwood silhouettes feature a soft midsole that enhances the court feel.

Fast and responsive, these sneakers provide energy return and move naturally with your foot during full-throttle, open floor attacks, rim runs, and beyond. When the game’s pace picks up, the Nike Lebron XXI lets you blaze through the court and shoot for the hoop with confidence.

Nike Lebron XXI features:

  • Upper made of a dimensional mesh feels airy and provides breathability and durability.
  • Bottom-loaded Zoom Air unit in the heel adds cushioning.
  • Carbon fibre midfoot plate offers steadiness and sturdiness.
